utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each is fully specified: 
1. property – includes type, location, price, currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, features, viewing_scheduled → fully specified.
2. financing – includes method, fees, currency, documentation → fully specified.
3. legal_services – includes service_name, cost, currency, service_level, status → fully specified.
4. moving_services – includes service_name, cost, currency, service_level, packing_included, status → fully specified.
5. setup_services – includes inspection and utilities with detailed cost, currency, status, services_included → fully specified.
6. total_budget – includes property_cost, all service costs, total_services, grand_total, currency → fully specified.
All six items appear complete and appropriate for the user’s task.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a townhouse in east end Toronto priced at CAD 750,000. In the ground-truth ratings, the only purchase property near this price and description is the 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD 750K, rating 6). The financing method chosen is 'mortgage' with processing fees of CAD 800, which corresponds to the 'First-Time Buyer' mortgage (arrangement_fee CAD 800, rating 10). The legal service 'Enhanced Priority Access' costing CAD 800 most closely matches the 'Basic Legal Package' (price CAD 800, rating 8). The moving service named 'Premium Legal Package' with cost CAD 650 actually aligns by price and features (standard level, packing included) with 'Standard Moving' (price CAD 650, rating 8). The inspection service 'Full Structural Survey' directly matches the same name (price CAD 650, rating 9). The utilities setup costing CAD 280 with comprehensive coverage (gas, electricity, water, internet, phone, smart meters) matches 'Premium Utilities' (price CAD 280, rating 9).
